mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simple_review ( SIMPLE_REVIEW_NO, SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID, SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, SIMPLE_REVIEW_RATING, SIMPLE_REVIEW_CONTENT, SIMPLE_REVIEW_DATE ) VALUES ( simple_review_seq.NEXTVAL, #{simpleReviewMemberId}, #{simpleReviewTmdbMovieId}, #{simpleReviewRating}, #{simpleReviewContent}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(SIMPLE_REVIEW_RATING) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{movieId} AND SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
select count(*) from simple_review where simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
select avg(simple_review_rating) from simple_review where simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT simple_review_rating as rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM simple_review WHERE simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId} GROUP BY simple_review_rating ORDER BY simple_review_rating

SELECT simple_review_no as simpleReviewNo, simple_review_member_id as simpleReviewMemberId, simple_review_tmdb_movie_id as simpleReviewTmdbMovieId, simple_review_rating as simpleReviewRating, simple_review_content as simpleReviewContent, simple_review_date as simpleReviewDate, (select member_nickname from member where member_id = simple_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (select member_profile_img from member where member_id = simple_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg FROM simple_review WHERE simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY simple_review_no DESC

SELECT ug.USERPICK_GENRE_NAME as genreName, COUNT(*) as count FROM userpick_genre ug WHERE ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO IN ( SELECT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID IN ( SELECT sr.SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID FROM simple_review sr WHERE sr.SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ) ) GROUP BY ug.USERPICK_GENRE_NAME ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT simple_review_rating as rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM simple_review WHERE simple_review_member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY simple_review_rating ORDER BY simple_review_rating

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, b.* FROM ( (SELECT sr.simple_review_no as simpleReviewNo, sr.simple_review_member_id as simpleReviewMemberId, sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id as simpleReviewTmdbMovieId, sr.simple_review_rating as simpleReviewRating, sr.simple_review_content as simpleReviewContent, sr.simple_review_date as simpleReviewDate, sr.simple_review_date as simpleReviewEnrollDate, (SELECT member_nickname FROM member WHERE member_id = sr.simple_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (SELECT member_profile_img FROM member WHERE member_id = sr.simple_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg, um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_title as movieTitle, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as moviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_release_date as movieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as movieRuntime FROM simple_review sr LEFT JOIN userpick_movie um ON sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id WHERE sr.simple_review_member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY sr.simple_review_no DESC)b ) ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review sr INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id WHERE sr.simple_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND um.userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, b.* FROM ( (SELECT sr.simple_review_no as simpleReviewNo, sr.simple_review_member_id as simpleReviewMemberId, sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id as simpleReviewTmdbMovieId, sr.simple_review_rating as simpleReviewRating, sr.simple_review_content as simpleReviewContent, sr.simple_review_date as simpleReviewDate, sr.simple_review_date as simpleReviewEnrollDate, (SELECT member_nickname FROM member WHERE member_id = sr.simple_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (SELECT member_profile_img FROM member WHERE member_id = sr.simple_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg, um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_title as movieTitle, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as moviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_release_date as movieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as movieRuntime FROM simple_review sr INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id WHERE sr.simple_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND um.userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY sr.simple_review_no DESC)b ) ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, b.* FROM ( (SELECT DISTINCT sr.simple_review_no as simpleReviewNo, sr.simple_review_member_id as simpleReviewMemberId, sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id as simpleReviewTmdbMovieId, sr.simple_review_rating as simpleReviewRating, sr.simple_review_content as simpleReviewContent, sr.simple_review_date as simpleReviewDate, sr.simple_review_date as simpleReviewEnrollDate, (SELECT member_nickname FROM member WHERE member_id = sr.simple_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (SELECT member_profile_img FROM member WHERE member_id = sr.simple_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg, um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_title as movieTitle, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as moviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_release_date as movieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as movieRuntime FROM simple_review sr INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.userpick_movie_no = ug.userpick_genre_movie_no WHERE sr.simple_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND ug.userpick_genre_id = #{genreId} ORDER BY sr.simple_review_no DESC)b ) ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}
